metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5194
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 4c, S7, S7: pulldown of endogenous RPS23RG1 in wildtype and RPS23RG1-knockout mice showed interaction with PSD93 (DLG2) and PSD95 (DLG4).

Figure 4d: confocal imaging of overexpressed human HA-tagged RPS23RG1 in mouse primary neuronal cultures showed partial co-localization with PSD93 (DLG2) and PSD95 (DLG4).

Further, authors showed RPS23RG1 enhanced PSD93 and PSD95 turnover (Fig. 3, 4).. Experimental description: annotated the confocal localization evidence in Figure 4d; "HA-tagged human RR1 was transfected into WT mouse primary neurons at DIV4."

the human protein sequence is described in PMID:26733416 and is available as GenBank nucleotide ID MH807581.1

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
